vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách/nền tảng
vocab.example: During my formative years in primary school, I developed a deep-seated fascination with the natural world.

vocab.meaning: có năng khiếu bẩm sinh về cái gì
vocab.example: I always seemed to have a natural flair for Mathematics, so I could solve complex puzzles with ease.

vocab.meaning: thu hút/cuốn hút sự tưởng tượng của ai đó
vocab.example: History lessons really captivated my imagination, as they transported me back to ancient civilizations.

vocab.meaning: một trí óc ham học hỏi/thích khám phá
vocab.example: Being a child with an inquisitive mind, I found Science experiments to be the highlight of my week.
While I was mediocre at sports, I tended to excel at linguistic subjects like Literature and English.

vocab.meaning: học tập qua thực hành/trải nghiệm thực tế
vocab.example: I loved Arts and Crafts because of the hands-on learning approach, which allowed me to be creative.
Primary school provided me with the foundational knowledge in Ethics that still guides my principles today.
The teacher used interactive games to stimulate our curiosity about different cultures and countries.
My favorite subject was Biology because it satisfied my innate thirst for knowledge about how living things function.

vocab.meaning: để lại ấn tượng sâu đậm/lâu dài
vocab.example: The music classes left a lasting impression on me, sparking a lifelong passion for playing the piano.
